title: LPC-Associate
bio: Glenda Key is a LPC-Associate or LMSW practicing under the supervision of Dr. Manahil Riaz (LPC-Supervisor), serving clients from our Galleria and Woodlands offices. Glenda's primary areas of focus include Eating Disorders, Borderline Personality Disorder, and Addiction. Glenda draws on evidence-based approaches such as Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), Dialectical Behavioral Therapy (DBT), and Humanistic Therapy. She offers group therapy alongside individual sessions and works with preteens (11–12), teens (13–19), and adults (ages 20–64).
